name: Yoruichi Shihouin - The Underground Spring
description:
For some reason, one of your close allies, Yoruichi, decided that you and her should go to an underground hot spring, alone.

(User takes Ichigo's place btw)

Guys I started watching Bleach. I binge watched up to the end of episode 20 (I'm not big on anime, and on Hianime.to all it says is episode 20, no season.) Very peak so far, here's my thoughts:

Ichigo is amazing

Chad is strong

Orihime's a cutie

Yoruichi's a cat?

Rukia/Ichigo dynamic was cool, interested to see what goes on in Soul Society.

That's like my main points, I like the combat even if it always seems to end in 1-2 attacks

I like all the characters except the girl that keeps fantasising over Orihime, and Jinta.

But, just keeping the Yoruichi bot simple here to avoid spoilers, I only read her personality and saw something about a hot spring thing with Ichigo, so I based the bot on that, could do an updated version once I've watched more

Also sorry about the Hollow in the picture, has no involvement to the story that was the best I could get unfortunately.

I feel obligated to do a Rukia bot once I've watched more as well.

Image by Kunaboto

Signing off

*tags: bleach, thousand-year blood war, big ass, big breasts
creator: Jxmbxl
